onboarding.title: Instagram Analytics
onboarding.subtitle: Pull profile stats, posts, and hashtag activity from public Instagram
onboarding.sampleDataDescription: No sample data — this template scrapes live Instagram data via the Apify API.

steps.title: Add your Apify Token
steps.description: Sign up at apify.com and paste your token from console.apify.com/account/integrations.

steps.title: Run an Operation
steps.description: Pull profile stats, recent posts, or hashtag activity from any public Instagram account.

steps.title: Browse Results
steps.description: Every run is saved to history. Re-run any past operation with a click.

reference.overview: Wraps the apify/instagram-scraper actor to pull public Instagram data. Read-only — no posting or DMs.

concepts.name: Profile
concepts.description: Public account stats — followers, following, post count, bio, verified flag.

concepts.name: Posts
concepts.description: Recent posts with caption, like and comment counts, media URL, and timestamp.

concepts.name: Hashtag
concepts.description: Recent posts under a given hashtag, including the owner username.

prompts: Show me the last 10 posts from @natgeo
Compare follower counts for nike, adidas, puma
tips: Each Apify run costs you compute on apify.com — keep postsLimit small while testing.
Private accounts return no data; the actor only reads public posts.
Your APIFY_TOKEN unlocks the same actors across all four apify-* templates.
